gems.title: 宇宙巨人：希曼崛起
gems.summary: 亚当（尼古拉斯·加利齐纳 饰）在神秘圣剑的召唤下，尘封十五年的异世界王子身份觉醒，平凡人生被彻底颠覆。他跨越时空重返埃坦尼亚，但故乡早已在骷髅王的统治下分崩离析。为拯救曾经的家园与现在的世界，亚当必须再次拔出圣剑，喊出那句响彻寰宇的咒语——“赐予我力量吧！我是希曼！”
gems.summaryEn: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, A
gems.whyWatch: 经典IP重启，中二热血与史诗感并存的异世界冒险，值得为情怀与爽点买单。
gems.whyWatchEn: A surprisingly earnest and visually bold revival of the classic He-Man franchise, blending nostalgic camp with genuine epic fantasy stakes.
gems.audience: 80后90后怀旧粉丝、奇幻动作片爱好者、对IP重启持开放态度的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Gen X & Millennial nostalgic fans, fantasy-action enthusiasts, viewers open to IP reboots with heart.

gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 另类浪漫喜剧，用错位的语音留言编织出治愈又心动的现代爱情童话。
gems.whyWatchEn: A fresh, voice-note-driven romantic comedy that turns grief, chance, and vulnerability into an unexpectedly charming love story.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松治愈爱情故事的观众、对非传统浪漫设定好奇的影迷。
gems.audienceEn: Viewers who enjoy light-hearted, healing romance; fans of unconventional love stories.

gems.title: 玩具总动员5
gems.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
gems.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new
gems.whyWatch: 皮克斯经典续作直面数字时代童年变迁，温情与创意不减，但创新性稍逊。
gems.whyWatchEn: A thoughtful, bittersweet exploration of toys vs. screens in modern childhood, though it plays it safer than predecessors.
gems.audience: 皮克斯粉丝、亲子家庭观众、对数字时代育儿话题感兴趣的成人。
gems.audienceEn: Pixar fans, families with children, adults interested in digital-age parenting themes.
